final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic-style scientific visualization combining macro and micro views of the human nervous system.

Style/medium: scientific infographic blending medical illustration precision with art poster visual impact, inspired by NASA cosmic imagery and vintage anatomy atlases
Composition: central translucent human silhouette with glowing neural network extending from cerebral cortex through spinal cord to limb extremities, inset zoom panel showing single neuron ultrastructure
Subject: macro view — luminous blue-white neural pathways resembling cosmic nebulae; micro view — detailed neuron with dendrites, axon, myelin sheath, synaptic vesicles, neurotransmitter particles dispersing across synaptic cleft
Scene/backdrop: deep cosmic black void suggesting infinite space
Lighting/mood: bioluminescent glow emanating from neural pathways, subtle rim lighting on human silhouette, mysterious and awe-inspiring
Color palette: cool cyan and ice blue as dominant, pale white for neural glow, sparse gold accents for focal points, deep black negative space
Materials/textures: semi-transparent organic membranes, phosphorescent fiber-optic neural tracts, crystalline synaptic structures
Constraints: suitable for educational publishing and medical brand communications; must maintain scientific accuracy in neuron anatomy
Avoid: cartoon simplification, oversaturated neon colors, cluttered composition, photorealistic skin texture, 8K stuffer language
